name: Bank Ochrony Srodowiska S.A.
summary: Bank Ochrony Srodowiska S.A. provides various banking products and services in Poland. The company operates through Institutional Customers, Retail Customers, Treasury and Investment Activity, and Other segments. It offers current accounts, including personal accounts, settlement, and savings accounts; promotional deposits; foreign currency term deposits; credit products, which includes pro-ecological loans, cash loans, mortgage, and stock exchange loans, as well as debit and credit cards. The company engages in leasing activity to finance ecological projects; provision of financial, advisory, brokerage, and consulting services; bancassurance products, such as life insurance for borrowers, unemployment insurance, and insurance packages for payment cards; cash settlements products; and operates wind farms. It acts as a broker and an agent of insurance companies, and offers electronic and mobile banking for individual customers. The company serves corporate and public finance customers, as well as retails, individuals, micro-enterprises, and housing communities. It operates through a network of 53 branches. Bank Ochrony Srodowiska S.A. was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Warsaw, Poland.
